top_signals.title: Market Risks Keep Multiplying: Doriwala
top_signals.summary: Alifia Doriwala, co-chief investment officer at RockCreek, joins Scarlet Fu on "Bloomberg Markets." A standoff between the US and Iran over key issues lifted oil prices, dragging down stocks and bonds on concern that a prolonged closure of the Strait of Hormuz could worsen energy disruptions and fuel inflation. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: AI spending expected to top $1 trillion in 2 years. That estimate's way too low if Jensen Huang's right
top_signals.summary: "The capex is at a trillion dollars, and it's growing toward the three to four [trillion-dollar mark]," said Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: An AI trade involving energy and infrastructure that's doubled your money, topping Nvidia
top_signals.summary: If you put the same money into a basket of companies that are building out AI infrastructure and energy sources, you’ve done much better than stocks like Nvidia.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Oil Edges Up After Plunging on Optimism Over US-Iran Agreement - Bloomberg.com
top_signals.summary: Oil Edges Up After Plunging on Optimism Over US-Iran Agreement  Bloomberg.com
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Government steps in to back long-term resilience of UK’s chemicals and ceramics industries
top_signals.summary: The Government has announced new funding packages for the ceramics and chemicals sectors, worth £120 million and £350 million respectively.
